raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX I was charged {$1100.00} to my Barclays Credit card at an XXXX XXXX. I was not in possession of my card and it was used without fraudulently. I immediately made a dispute and was refunded. Barclays returned on XXXX stating chip technology was used so I will not be covered and the refund will be reversed. This was a fraudulent charge and should be covered under the fraud protections of my card.
